text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite being impressed by the strength of the
other racers at the Takarazuka Kinen, Mejiro
Dober remains focused on what she really has to
defeat—her own weakness.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove, noticing a change in Mejiro Dober,
looks forward to seeing her performance.
